name: CUT-B2: consent + family cutover - write machine, coexistence break tests, deletion/export twins
description: EXECUTION GATE: starts only after the new-llm merge lands on main (PRG-17 boundary event 'new-llm merged') - CUT-A's drizzle generate must run against the post-merge journal. Depends on CUT-B1 (helpers, profileMeta, consent read module); may run parallel with CUT-B3. Plan sec-3 row 2 + sec-2.3/2.6. One reviewable PR: consent-v2.ts write machine (request lifecycle per the sec-1.2 state machine, grants, withdrawal = stamp withdrawn_at on the live grant / re-grant appends, deletion); REQUIRED GDPR/COPPA coexistence break tests replicating BUG-466/465 against v2 (person holds both bases, COPPA row newer; GDPR-pinned resolver + dashboard must report GDPR status; red-green per regression-AC pattern); consent routes/web re-target; deletion.ts/export.ts/notices v2 twins INCLUDING the v1.6 D2/D3 compliance legs (Art-17 byok_waitlist erase via login.email; mentor_activity_ledger Art-15 export inclusion); guardianship reads (family-access, family-bridge, dashboard, nudge, notifications, solo-progress-reports, weekly-digest); B2-row Inngest functions. consent_request has no flag-off writer (single-live-store argument 2 in PR).
acceptanceCriteria: Coexistence break tests red-green recorded; deletion/export twins carry D2/D3 legs (tests prove ledger in export, byok erase on delete); flag-off break coverage extends to B2 modules; CI green; single-live-store argument in PR description.
riskImpact: P1/High-care: consent correctness + GDPR legs - the plan's sensitive surface 2.
